title: IEA says ‘unconditionally’ re-opening Hormuz vital to end energy crisis

snapshot.title: IEA says ‘unconditionally’ re-opening Hormuz vital to end energy crisis
snapshot.description: PARIS: The head of the International Energy Agency said Tuesday that “unconditionally” opening the Strait of Hormuz to Gulf tanker traffic was essential to ending the shock from soaring oil and gas prices to economies worldwide. “The single most important solution to this problem is the fully and unconditionally opening up of the state of Hormuz to shipping,” IEA chief Fatih
snapshot.author: AFPReuters
snapshot.pageTitle: IEA says ‘unconditionally’ re-opening Hormuz vital to end energy crisis | Arab News
